source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/10. 설계변경 문서/(A-TCF-5-019-A-038) 2G, 3G用 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 件_2024.08.30/설계변경 문서/첨부문서/A1717MCW_BOM(ABYZ).xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM listing for A1717MCW / 2G_1717 assembly, deco sheet, covers, detector assembly, packing, and accessory set.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports bill of materials traceability for A1717MCW product configuration and related assembly or design-change documentation.
keyPoints: Top-level BOM item is 1717_ABYZ_DECO_SHEET with product number MSH-200005 and quantity EA 1.
A1717MCW_ASSY is listed as ASM-200003 with specification 2G_A1717MCW_ASSY and quantity EA 1.
Major subassemblies include A1717MCW-MT process, 2G_1717_REAR_COVER_ASSY, and 2G_1717_MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY.
Accessory set ACCSET-MCW(2G) includes battery, power supply, charger, LAN cables, ferrite core, power cords, recharger adaptor, and AC1200 Archer C64 Wi-Fi router.
A harness-signal item lists IEC60332-1 in its specification.

entities.name: Thallium Iodide
entities.evidence: 01-3-01-01-4 Thallium Iodide M20R2-001 Thallium Iodide(99.999%),beads G 10

concepts.name: Scintillator materials
concepts.evidence: Cesium Iodide M20R1-001 CsI (99.999%) / CsI (99.99%) / CsI Recycle (99.99%) KG 1.5

evidence.claim: The document is a BOM output.
The top-level deco sheet item is 1717_ABYZ_DECO_SHEET, product number MSH-200005, specification 2G_1717_DECO_SHEET, quantity EA 1.
The BOM includes 2G_BATTERY_COVER_ABYZ_GY, product number MSV-000004, specification 2G_BATTERY_COVER, quantity EA 1.
A1717MCW_ASSY is listed as product number ASM-200003 with specification 2G_A1717MCW_ASSY and quantity EA 1.
The A1717MCW-MT process includes HME(BOE)-1717-530N_NA_도 with dimensions 477(L) x 458(W) x 0.7(t), CsI 530 micrometer, and Al Sheet.
Cesium Iodide is listed as material M20R1-001 with CsI purity entries and total required quantity KG 1.5.
Thallium Iodide is listed as material M20R2-001, Thallium Iodide(99.999%), beads, quantity G 10.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-3-01-01-4 Thallium Iodide M20R2-001 Thallium Iodide(99.999%),beads G 10

evidence.claim: The rear cover subassembly is 2G_1717_REAR_COVER_ASSY, product number ASM-200001, quantity EA 1.
The middle block subassembly is 2G_1717_MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY, product number ASM-200002, quantity EA 1.
The accessory set ACCSET-MCW(2G) includes BATTERY-2G DETECTOR product number MI43-01011A, quantity EA 2.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-04 BATTERY-2G DETECTOR MI43-01011A ELT-3S1PA,Li-ion Pol EA 2
